vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is non-viable. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the provided images. The specimens are either dead, removed, or were never present.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plants and the total loss of visual input in the final two frames.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical registry. From the earliest image, the pots appear to be devoid of the expected flora, containing only soil and scattered debris. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is absent. The final two images are completely black, indicating a failure of the monitoring equipment or a total lack of illumination, preventing any further assessment of the biome's status.
